update.name: Copy-Fail-Exploit-CVE-2026-31431
update.description: Most Linux LPEs need a race window or a kernel-specific offset. Copy Fail is a straight-line logic flaw, it needs neither. The same 732-byte Python script (or .c elf) roots every Linux distribution shipped since 2017.
